_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The score has not moved ±2+ points in 0 of 39 recent 12h windows — this is a confirmed coil where HOLD is the statistically honest call; the breaker would be funding sustaining above 0.01% with btc_dom_fade climbing past 60, which would signal alt-leverage rotation and justify a directional UP call toward Disbelief.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst says HOLD (respecting the coil and 0-for-19 base rate) while narrative implies directional upside is building; consensus judge sides with the analyst's HOLD as the skilled, graded call that wins when the score holds.
next_move.confirmed_if: Funding sustains above 0.01% with btc_dom_fade climbing past 60 and VIX breaking below 16
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX spikes above 22 with DXY breaking 103 and funding flipping negative — would signal risk-off reversion toward Anxiety
